name: FRANKLIN COVEY CO
summary: Franklin Covey Co. is a global organizational performance improvement company. It delivers subscription-based solutions including the All Access Pass (AAP) for enterprises and Leader in Me membership for educational institutions. Core offerings include The 7 Habits of Highly Effective People, The Four Disciplines of Execution, The Speed of Trust, and Multipliers, supported by consulting, coaching, and an AI Coach. The company serves corporations, governments, nonprofits, and educational institutions across approximately 150 countries. Fiscal year 2025 consolidated net revenue totaled $267.1 million.

products.name: All Access Pass (AAP)
products.description: Subscription-based access to proprietary content, implementation tools, assessments, and expert consulting for enterprise clients.

products.name: Leader in Me Membership
products.description: Subscription service providing digital curriculum, leadership lessons, and coaching resources for educational institutions.

products.name: The 7 Habits of Highly Effective People
products.description: Flagship leadership and personal effectiveness content offering, with a revised version launched in early fiscal 2025.

products.name: The Four Disciplines of Execution
products.description: Content offering focused on helping organizations execute on their most critical priorities.

products.name: The Speed of Trust
products.description: Content offering focused on building trust within organizations and teams.

products.name: Multipliers
products.description: Content offering focused on leadership behaviors that amplify the capabilities of team members.

products.name: Franklin Covey AI Coach
products.description: AI-powered tool included in AAP to help individuals deepen learning and application of Franklin Covey content.

products.name: Impact Platform
products.description: Technology delivery platform supporting Franklin Covey content and client engagement, with ongoing enhancements.

products.name: The Teacher Believed in Me
products.description: Licensed content acquired in fiscal 2024 intended to expand Leader in Me membership offerings.

partnerships.description: Licensee partners deliver Franklin Covey content and services in approximately 150 countries and territories where the company lacks a direct office.
